description: Tier-2 specialist — component tests via React Testing Library; query by role/label, test state variants, reject brittle test-id queries where semantics exist.

cases.prompt: A React <UserCard> component renders a user's name, an 'Edit' button (visible only to admins), and a 'Suspended' badge (visible when user.suspended is true). Write component tests covering: (1) default render with name, (2) admin sees Edit button, (3) non-admin doesn't, (4) suspended badge shown/hidden.
cases.notes: Must use RTL queries. Must cover all 4 variants.

cases.prompt: Write component tests for a React <SearchForm> with a text input, a 'Search' submit button, and inline validation: empty submit shows 'Query is required', and input under 3 chars shows 'Query too short'. Use @testing-library/user-event for interactions.
cases.notes: Must use user-event (not fireEvent). Must test both error messages.

cases.prompt: Should I add data-testid attributes to every element in my component to make testing easier?
cases.notes: Agent must recommend semantic queries (role/label) over test-ids and explain why.
